use_cases: Bottom navigation footer for websites with theme toggle functionality
Light/dark mode switcher integrated into page layout
Quick access scroll-to-top button for long pages
Minimal utility bar for landing pages or documentation sites
ai_summary: A minimal footer component featuring theme toggle buttons (light/dark mode) and a scroll-to-top button. Uses dicons library for icons and next-themes for theme management. Styled with a rounded border container, suitable for placement at the bottom of pages in various web applications.
